Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0927 "GAMEOVERII-SIDE2-0927" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Game Over II (Side 2).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Zeroed out an unnecessary repeated byte pattern from $45C0 - $5FC0. 2. Patched the JSR $AC23 instruction at $A6BD to be JSR $5000 instead. 3. Added a small routine at $5000 which checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the game will behave as if 2 is pressed and start the game in joystick control mode. It then calls the subroutine at $AC23 to carry on the normal code flow. 4. Changed $A610 from $01 to $00 to remove the need to enter the access code to start the game.
